title: Yusen Logistics Launches New Green Solution to Allocate Environmental Benefits - Support Customers to Reduce Scope 3 Emissions in Ocean, Air and Land Freight
content: Yusen Logistics Global Management Co., Ltd. announced a new green solution, "Alternative Fuel", which delivers environmental benefits achieved through the use of sustainable fuels to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions in ocean, air, and land transport services. To create a sustainable supply chain, the company will support its customers in reducing their Scope 3 emissions and advance its initiative to use renewable fuels.
author: Analysts Account
